verdicts.evidence: app/src/lib/marmot/profileSync.ts:51-75 — serialiseProfileUpdate is async, calls signer.signEvent, returns JSON.stringify(envelope)
app/src/lib/marmot/profileSync.ts:126-144 — parseProfilePayload calls verifyEvent, returns payload with signedEvent populated on pass
app/src/lib/marmot/profileSync.ts:140-141 — if (!verified) return null; tested at profileSync.test.ts:116-127
app/src/lib/marmot/profileSync.ts:147-153 — legacy non-envelope object returns without signedEvent; tested at profileSync.test.ts:103-114
app/src/lib/marmot/profileSync.ts:183 — payloadToMemberProfile threads signedEvent into return
app/src/types/index.ts:206-214 — SignedProfileEvent exported with required fields
app/src/types/index.ts:224 — MemberProfile has optional signedEvent?: SignedProfileEvent
app/src/lib/marmot/profileRequestSync.ts:40 exports PROFILE_REQUEST_KIND=30; 46-53 ProfileRequestPayload type
profileRequestSync.ts:64-75 — serialiseProfileRequest calls crypto.randomUUID() per invocation
profileRequestSync.ts:81-98 — null on malformed JSON, missing type, missing targetPubkey
profileRequestSync.ts:18-33 — all six timing constants exported with correct values
profileRequestSync.ts:111-115 — true on falsy profile or age >= PROFILE_STALENESS_MS
profileRequestSync.ts:185-190 — returns RELAY_BACKOFF_MIN_MS + Math.random()*(MAX-MIN); validated over 200 calls
profileRequestSync.ts:152-175 — full truth table implemented; 14 parameterised tests cover all branches
profileRequestStorage.ts:17-22 — createStore('quizzl-profile-request-memos'), memoKey ${groupId}:${targetPubkey}
profileRequestStorage.ts:31-36 — get(memoKey, store) ?? null
profileRequestStorage.ts:39-41 — set(memoKey, memo, store) verbatim
profileRequestStorage.ts:55-93 — full upsert truth table per AC
profileRequestStorage.ts:99-113 — upserts with lastAnsweredAt=now, attempts=0
profileRequestStorage.ts:119-130 — '*' clears entire store; otherwise iterates and deletes ${groupId}:* keys
groupStorage.ts:140-164 — mergeMemberProfile persists signedEvent; LWW by updatedAt at line 151

groupStorage.ts:198 — clearAllGroupData calls clearProfileRequestMemos('*') for account-wide reset. Per-group leaveGroup cleanup is Story 03's AC-041 which also holds (MarmotContext.tsx:942). The AC's amendment footnote explicitly defers per-group cleanup to Story 03.
MarmotContext.tsx:241-286 — useEffect with deps [ready, groups.length, pubkeyHex], appStartSweepRanRef guard prevents re-run
profileRequestRunner.ts:80-110 — sweepStaleProfiles skips self, filters via isProfileStale, gates via shouldEmitRequest, emits one rumor per eligible member
MarmotContext.tsx:1146,1213 — requestProfilesIfStale(groupId) useCallback exposed on context; calls sweepStaleProfiles with single-group scope and same dedupe predicates
pages/groups.tsx:123-180 — route-enter useEffect calls requestProfilesIfStale(id) after setGroup(found); requestedOnEntryForRef guard ensures exactly-once per group entry
grep prevMemberCount and currentMembers.length> in MarmotContext.tsx returns zero hits; no profile-rumor send on member-count growth
MarmotContext.tsx:622-639 — onHistorySynced introduction preserved, fires once per group via profilePublishedRef
MarmotContext.tsx:813-925 (specifically 901-913) — inviteByNpub republish preserved

handlers/profileRequestHandler.ts:40-48 — PROFILE_REQUEST_KIND dispatcher arm parses, branches on targetPubkey===selfPubkeyHex, calls sendSelfProfile (MarmotContext.tsx:673-678 wraps serialiseProfileUpdate + sendRumorSafe with no backoff)
handlers/profileRequestHandler.ts:50-55 — else branch delegates to handleIncomingProfileRequest only; no direct profile-send for non-self target
handlers/profileRequestHandler.ts:43-44 — recordRequestEmitted called unconditionally after successful parse, before self/other branch

profileRequestRunner.ts:142-176 — handleIncomingProfileRequest loads cached, guards on signedEvent + sinceUpdatedAt, schedules setTimeout(pickBackoffMs()) in pendingRelayTimers Map keyed by (groupId, targetPubkey)
profileRequestRunner.ts:170-173 — on fire, sendRumor(groupId, cached.signedEvent verbatim) wrapped in PROFILE_RUMOR_KIND by MarmotContext.tsx:691-695
profileRequestRunner.ts:190-202 — notifyProfileObserved clears timer when observedUpdatedAt >= scheduledForUpdatedAt
handlers/profileHandler.ts:49-55 — PROFILE_RUMOR_KIND arm calls notifyProfileObserved on every verified incoming profile (including self-emitted)
profileRequestRunner.ts:154-155 — if (!cached?.signedEvent) return; before scheduling
profileRequestRunner.ts:157-158 — if (payload.sinceUpdatedAt && cached.updatedAt <= payload.sinceUpdatedAt) return

groupStorage.ts:156-158 — spurious 'await saveMemberProfiles(groupId, existing)' in the LWW no-update branch was removed in remediation round 1 (2026-05-18). Branch now returns false immediately with zero IDB writes. Regression test: app/tests/unit/marmot/groupStorage.test.ts (4 tests).
profileSync.ts:134-141 — verifyEvent returns null on failure; handlers/profileHandler.ts:29-30 — early return before any merge/cache/score write
MarmotContext.tsx:931-947 (specifically line 942) — leaveGroup useCallback calls clearProfileRequestMemos(groupId)
MarmotContext.tsx lines 630, 675, 799, 908, 1008 — all five serialiseProfileUpdate call sites use await + signer

app/tests/unit/profileRequestSync.test.ts covers isProfileStale boundaries (lines 185-225), full shouldEmitRequest truth table (14 parameterised, lines 231-343), pickBackoffMs range (200-call loop, lines 350-392)
app/tests/unit/marmot/profileSync.test.ts:27-48 sign/verify round trip; 103-114 legacy-fallback parse

Rewritten in RECONCILE 2026-05-18: now requires 5 Playwright scenarios + the unit/integration test profileRequestStorage.integration.test.ts for the retry boundary contract. Will be re-inspected on next resume (spec_sha moved). The 6th Playwright scenario remains test.fixme with a corrected comment citing the unit test.
installRumorCounter+getRumorCount in app/tests/e2e/helpers/rumor-counter.ts; deleteIdbRecord in app/tests/e2e/helpers/idb-record.ts; both imported and used by the spec

AC-047 second clause was amended in remediation round 1 (2026-05-18): the original drop-on-pubkey-mismatch requirement was incorrect — it would have broken relay-on-behalf. The correct guard is verifyEvent(signedEvent), already implemented in parseProfilePayload (profileSync.ts:134-141) and tested by AC-003/AC-040. Cross-pubkey relay (signedEvent.pubkey !== rumor.pubkey) is now explicitly required to be accepted. Regression test added: profileHandler.test.ts 'relay-on-behalf … is accepted, NOT dropped (AC-047 amended)'.
